violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Owner has CFSM but is linked to owners other establishment. Another employee must register with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The hand-washing sink in the back storage area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

FOOD (baked goods/hot hold items) that is available for CONSUMER shall be prominently labeled with the following information in plain view of the CONSUMER: 1. The common name of the FOOD, or absent a common name, an adequately descriptive identity statement; 2. If made from two or more ingredients, a list of ingredients in descending order of predominance by weight, including a declaration of artificial color or flavor and chemical preservatives, if contained in the FOOD 3.The name of the FOOD source for each MAJOR FOOD ALLERGEN contained in the FOOD unless the FOOD source is already part of the common or usual name of the respective ingredient. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by burrows in the dumpster area and live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving and various equipment have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
An accumulation of food and debris was observed in the dumpster area. Area to be cleaned to prevent further harborage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The hand-washing sink in the back retail area was blocked by storage bins. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the all refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by mutiple burrows surrounding outside dumpster area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per phone call with PIC, PCS is waiting on approval from store owner to treat burrows. Establishment to send plan of action or PCS invoices to inspector by 11/7/23. Failure to provide proof will result in further disciplinary action. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
Various beverages were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler and retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023

Lowboy located in the front counter area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures). Unit was taken out of service and food product was moved to colder refrigeration unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023

The following physical facilities has an accumulation debris: 1.floors in walk in cooler and retail area behind equipment observed with soil residue and debris. 2.walls and ceilings in walk in cooler observed with biofilm. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023
